mapper.select: SELECT cart_no AS cartNo, member_no AS memberNo, product_no AS productNo, option_signature AS optionSignature, quantity, reg_date AS regDate FROM cart WHERE cart_no = #{cartNo}
SELECT cart_no AS cartNo, member_no AS memberNo, product_no AS productNo, option_signature AS optionSignature, quantity, reg_date AS regDate FROM cart ORDER BY cart_no DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cart ( member_no, product_no, option_signature, quantity, reg_date ) VALUES ( #{memberNo}, #{productNo}, #{optionSignature}, #{quantity}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT product_no AS productNo, stock, status FROM product WHERE product_no = #{productNo}

SELECT option_no AS optionNo, product_no AS productNo, option_group_no AS optionGroupNo, option_name AS optionName, option_value AS optionValue, sort_order AS sortOrder FROM product_option WHERE product_no = #{productNo} ORDER BY option_group_no ASC, sort_order ASC, option_no ASC

SELECT cart_no AS cartNo, member_no AS memberNo, product_no AS productNo, option_signature AS optionSignature, quantity, reg_date AS regDate FROM cart WHERE member_no = #{memberNo} AND product_no = #{productNo} AND option_signature = #{optionSignature}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO cart_option ( cart_no, option_no ) VALUES
(#{cartNo}, #{optionNo})
mapper.select:
SELECT c.cart_no AS cartNo, c.product_no AS productNo, c.quantity AS quantity,
p.product_name AS productName, p.basic_desc AS basicDesc, p.price AS price, p.discount_rate AS discountRate, p.point AS point, p.delivery_fee AS deliveryFee,
img.image_path AS imagePath,
COALESCE( ( SELECT GROUP_CONCAT( CONCAT( po.option_name, ' : ', po.option_value ) ORDER BY po.option_group_no ASC, po.sort_order ASC SEPARATOR ' / ' ) FROM cart_option co JOIN product_option po ON co.option_no = po.option_no WHERE co.cart_no = c.cart_no ), '' ) AS optionText
FROM cart c
JOIN product p ON c.product_no = p.product_no
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT product_no, MAX( CASE WHEN image_type = 'THUMB1' THEN image_path END ) AS image_path FROM product_image GROUP BY product_no ) img ON p.product_no = img.product_no
WHERE c.member_no = #{memberNo}
ORDER BY c.reg_date DESC, c.cart_no DESC

SELECT cart_no AS cartNo, member_no AS memberNo, product_no AS productNo, option_signature AS optionSignature, quantity, reg_date AS regDate FROM cart WHERE cart_no = #{cartNo} AND member_no = #{memberNo}
mapper.delete:
DELETE co FROM cart_option co JOIN cart c ON co.cart_no = c.cart_no WHERE c.member_no = #{memberNo} AND c.cart_no IN
#{cartNo}
